title: Seven Guns to Mesa
writer: Myles Wilder, Edward Dein, Mildred Dein
actors: Charles Quinlivan, Lola Albright, James Griffith
plot: A band of outlaws, led by "Papa" Clellan, hold up in a ghost town as they plan an attack on a wagon train loaded with gold. The unexpected arrival of a stagecoach forces the gang to hold the passengers and driver as hostages. The ...
